name: Hawaii State Art Museum
tagline: Free museum showcasing Hawaii's best contemporary art in a beautifully restored 1928 Spanish Colonial building downtown.
parking: Metered street parking on Hotel St
bestTime: Weekday afternoons for the quietest experience; First Friday evenings
talkStory: Housed in a beautifully restored 1928 Spanish Colonial building (the former YMCA Armed Services building), HiSAM showcases Hawaii's best contemporary art across multiple galleries — all for free. The permanent collection features works by Hawaii's leading artists, and rotating exhibitions highlight emerging talent. The sculpture garden courtyard is a peaceful surprise. Most tourists walk right past without realizing this free gem exists.
